staticText: Domestic worker pay-planning navigation assistant. Route users to the canonical calculator without prefill. The calculator uses only pay, work-pattern, wage-floor, overtime, allowance, contribution, readiness and dated source values entered by the user. Never ask AI to calculate, verify or retain those fields. No calculator, source or contract-readiness field is sent to AI. The page supplies no wage or contribution rate. Results stay in the browser unless the user deliberately copies, downloads a TXT summary or prints to PDF.
